chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Jafar Ibn Bashir Al-Bajali

text: و ما كان فيه عن جعفر بن بشير البجليّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطاب، عن جعفر بن بشير البجليّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Jafar ibn Bashir Al-Bajali has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Jafar ibn Bashir Al-Bajali.
